promotions.title: 0 Handling Fee for the First Remittance to Chinese Mainland
promotions.highlight: 💸 Zero fees on first remittance to Chinese Mainland with 1-hour arrival
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy zero handling fee on their first remittance to Chinese Mainland using the 'Remit to Chinese Mainland·WeRemit' feature in the Airstar Bank App. Funds can be received as soon as 1 hour after transfer.
promotions.quota: One-time offer per customer. Limited quota, first come, first served.

promotions.title: Activate Money Safe, Get a Pacific Coffee Voucher
promotions.highlight: ☕ Free HKD30 Pacific Coffee e-Cash Voucher when activating Money Safe
promotions.description: Customers who deposit any amount into a 'Money Safe' account will receive a HKD30 Pacific Coffee e-Cash Voucher. Money Safe is an anti-fraud feature introduced by HKMA that provides protection while still earning the same Savings/Time Deposit interest rates.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served.
promotions.cost: Deposit any amount into a Money Safe account

promotions.title: Travel With Visa Flight Booking Cash Rebate
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to $800 cash rebate on flight bookings with eligible airlines
promotions.description: Visa cardholders who use their Registered Eligible Visa Card to pay for air tickets with selected airlines can enjoy a cash rebate of up to $800. Eligible airlines include Air New Zealand, ANA, Ethiopian Airlines, EVA AIR and Singapore Airlines via their designated official Hong Kong or Macau websites.
promotions.quota: Cash rebate can be earned once per eligible Visa cardholder
promotions.cost: Minimum single transaction of $4,000 HKD/MOP required for $240 rebate; $8,000 HKD/MOP or above for $800 rebate

promotions.title: Bank Securities Transfer 24/7 Service
promotions.highlight: 🔄 24/7 instant securities transfers in HKD, USD, and CNY
promotions.description: Customers can perform bank securities transfers in multiple currencies including HKD, USD, and CNY with instant arrival. The service is available 24/7, providing flexibility for investment activities.

promotions.title: Lifetime $0 Commissions on HK Stocks
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade HK stocks from as low as HK$18 and US stocks at US$1.99 per order
promotions.description: Customers can trade Hong Kong stocks from as low as HK$18 per order and US stocks at just US$1.99 per order. The service includes access to fractional shares, allowing investments with as little as 1 share for HK stocks or US$5 for US stocks.
promotions.cost: Minimum HK$18 for HK stocks and US$1.99 for US stocks per order

promotions.title: Mobile Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: 📱 Open an account in as fast as 5 minutes via mobile phone
promotions.description: Both Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong can open an Airstar Bank account via mobile phone in as fast as 5 minutes. The service provides a convenient digital onboarding experience available anytime, anywhere.
promotions.quota: Available to Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong

promotions.title: No Account Management Fees
promotions.highlight: 💳 No account management fees and no minimum deposit balance
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers accounts with no management fees and no minimum deposit balance requirements. This allows customers to maintain their accounts without worrying about monthly fees or maintaining minimum balances.

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Personalized Stellar APR
promotions.highlight: 💵 Borrow up to 12x monthly salary with loan disbursement in as fast as 5 minutes
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers personal loans with a personalized Stellar APR ranging from 7.43% to 35.05%. Customers can borrow up to 12 times their monthly salary or HKD1,000,000 (whichever is lower), with the entire process from application to disbursement potentially completed in as fast as 5 minutes.
promotions.cost: APR ranges from 7.43% to 35.05% with repayment periods of 6 to 60 months

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌐 No minimum balance requirement with multi-currency support
promotions.description: Customers can open savings accounts with no minimum balance requirements and with multi-currency support. This provides flexibility for saving in different currencies according to personal preference.

promotions.title: Flexible Time Deposit Placement
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ 24/7 time deposit placement with flexible tenors
promotions.description: Customers can place time deposits anytime with flexible tenors, available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Interest booster options are available to help customers earn more on their deposits.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Instant Transfers
promotions.highlight: 📲 24/7 instant transfers in multiple currencies
promotions.description: Customers can perform transfers in multiple currencies including HKD, USD, CNY and others. The service supports transfers via mobile numbers, email addresses, or account numbers with 24/7 instant transfer capabilities for HKD and CNY through FPS.

promotions.title: Trade Hong Kong & US Stocks Instantly
promotions.highlight: 💳 Visa Platinum Card with Pay Shield 7/24 real-time fraud protection
promotions.description: The Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card offers stellar services including Pay Shield, a 24/7 real-time fraud protection feature. The card provides enhanced security for everyday purchases and transactions.

promotions.title: 24/7 Online Banking Services
promotions.highlight: ⏰ 24/7 online banking and 24-hour customer hotline service
promotions.description: Customers can access online banking services 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. The bank also provides a 24-hour customer hotline service for support at any time of day.

promotions.title: Fractional Shares Investing
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Invest in stocks with as little as 1 share for HK or US$5 for US markets
promotions.description: Airstar Bank allows customers to invest in fractional shares, starting with just 1 share for Hong Kong stocks or as little as US$5 for US stocks. This feature makes it possible to invest in high-priced securities with a smaller capital outlay, enabling portfolio diversification for all investors.
promotions.cost: Minimum investment of 1 share (HK) or US$5 (US)

promotions.title: Pay Shield Real-Time Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ 24/7 real-time fraud protection for payment transactions
promotions.description: Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card offers Pay Shield, a 24/7 real-time fraud protection system. This security feature continuously monitors transactions to detect and prevent fraudulent activities, providing cardholders with enhanced payment protection.

promotions.title: Money Safe Anti-Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced protection against fraud while earning interest
promotions.description: Money Safe feature provides enhanced protection against fraud losses. Secure your funds while still earning Savings or Time Deposit rates, with funds only unlockable through in-person appointment.

promotions.title: eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) up to 2.0% p.a. Interest Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to 2.0% p.a. interest rate on your savings
promotions.description: Customers who successfully upgrade to eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) through the AlipayHK App can enjoy up to 2.0% p.a. interest rate. The 2.0% rate applies to deposits between HKD 200,000 - 800,000, while deposits up to HKD 200,000 earn 0.5% p.a.
promotions.quota: Available to all customers who upgrade through AlipayHK App

promotions.title: SME Loan Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 100,000 cash rebate on first drawdown
promotions.description: Small and medium enterprises can enjoy a cash rebate of up to HKD 100,000 on their first loan drawdown. This limited-time promotion aims to support SMEs with their financing needs.
promotions.cost: Must apply for and draw down on an SME loan

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account Upgrade
promotions.highlight: 💱 Support for HKD, RMB and USD in one account
promotions.description: The savings account has been upgraded to support multiple currencies, including HKD, RMB and USD. Users can now transfer directly from their Libra Savings to third-party accounts, with daily transfer limits increased to up to HKD 1 million.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Platform with Low/Zero Commission
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Zero or reduced commission trading for stocks
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a promotion for securities trading with zero or reduced commission fees for Hong Kong and US stock markets. This promotion makes stock trading more cost-effective for investors.
promotions.cost: Must open a securities trading account

promotions.title: Insurance Products with Annual Rate up to 3.6%
promotions.highlight: 📈 Insurance product with up to 3.6% annualized rate
promotions.description: Ant Bank is offering an insurance product with up to 3.6% annualized rate. The insurance plan is provided by YF Life Insurance International Ltd. and distributed by Ant Bank in Hong Kong.
promotions.cost: Varies based on insurance plan selected

promotions.title: Fund Investment with HKD 1 Minimum
promotions.highlight: 💼 Invest in funds with as little as HKD 1
promotions.description: Customers can invest in selected funds with a minimum investment amount of just HKD 1. This permanent feature makes investing more accessible to all customers regardless of their investment capital.

promotions.title: New Ant Bank Investment Fund Platform
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Zero fees for fund subscription and redemption
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched a new investment fund platform featuring top-tier fund companies. During this limited-time promotion, customers can enjoy zero platform fees, 0% subscription fees, and waived redemption fees for all funds.

promotions.title: One-Minute Investment Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an investment account in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Customers can open an investment account with Ant Bank in as little as 3 minutes. The streamlined application process requires no income proof and offers immediate access upon successful account opening.
promotions.quota: Available to eligible customers aged 18 and above who are not US or Canadian citizens/residents

promotions.title: One-stop Hong Kong and US Stock Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Trade Hong Kong and US stocks on a single platform
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a one-stop trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, providing global investment opportunities. The platform offers various investment options including Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, and ETFs.
promotions.quota: Only available to Hong Kong residents
promotions.cost: Trading fees apply as per fee schedule

promotions.title: Guaranteed Safe Deposit Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your deposits for enhanced security against fraud
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Guaranteed Safe Deposit Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock idle deposits, preventing unauthorized transfers while still earning interest and maintaining deposit protection.

promotions.title: Time Deposit with Early Withdrawal Without Penalty
promotions.highlight: 🔓 Withdraw your time deposit early with zero penalty
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposits with no penalty for early withdrawal, allowing customers to access their funds when needed without financial penalties. Full withdrawal of the deposit is required (partial withdrawals not supported).

promotions.title: Direct Transfer from Libra Savings to Third-Party Accounts
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Transfer directly from Libra Savings to third-party accounts
promotions.description: Customers can now transfer funds directly from their Libra Savings account to third-party accounts through the Ant Bank APP. The daily transfer limit has also been increased to up to HKD 1 million.

promotions.title: Dual-Account Security Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your reserve deposits for enhanced security
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Dual-Account Security Service, an anti-fraud measure promoted by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock their reserve deposits, preventing fund transfers through any channel to reduce the risk of fraudulent transactions.

promotions.title: Installment Loan with Fast Approval
promotions.highlight: 💸 Simple loan application with instant fund disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers installment loans with a simple application process and instant fund disbursement. The service features flexible loan amounts, special low interest rates, a simplified application process, and fast approval and disbursement.
promotions.cost: Loan interest and potential fees apply

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Revolving Credit
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Revolving credit with flexible withdrawal and instant disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a revolving personal loan product where the credit limit can be reused, allowing flexible withdrawals and instant fund disbursement. Features include easy financial management, simple application, transparent fees, and flexible withdrawals.
promotions.cost: Loan interest and potential fees apply

promotions.title: SGAD (Smart Guarded Account Designation) Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your standby deposits with SGAD for extra security
promotions.description: Ant Bank (Hong Kong) has launched the Smart Guarded Account Designation (SGAD) service, an anti-fraud measure introduced by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock standby deposits which cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraudulent transfers.

promotions.title: Low Minimum Time Deposit Amount
promotions.highlight: 💰 Open a time deposit with just HKD 1
promotions.description: Ant Bank allows customers to place time deposits with a minimum amount of just HKD 1. This exceptionally low entry threshold makes time deposits accessible to all customers regardless of their financial capacity.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Place time deposits in HKD and USD currencies
promotions.description: Ant Bank's time deposit service supports both Hong Kong Dollar and US Dollar deposits. This multi-currency support allows customers to diversify their time deposits across different currencies.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Trade stocks with zero commission fees!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers zero commission on securities trading, allowing customers to trade Hong Kong and US stocks more cost-effectively. This promotion is part of their one-stop securities trading service with bank-level wealth management.
promotions.cost: Free, subject to terms and conditions

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit No Penalty for Early Withdrawal
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open your account in as fast as 3 minutes!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a fast account opening experience that can take as little as 3 minutes. This feature makes it convenient for customers to open investment accounts quickly without income proof documents.

promotions.title: Fastee Secure Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced security for your deposits with anti-fraud measures!
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Fastee Secure Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. The service allows customers to lock spare deposits that cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraud while still earning interest.

promotions.title: One-Stop Securities Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Trade Hong Kong and US stocks on a single platform!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a one-stop trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, providing global investment opportunities. The platform gives access to Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment solutions.
promotions.cost: Trading fees apply as per service charge schedule

promotions.title: Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in just 5 minutes with HKID and mobile number
promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers simplified account opening that can be completed in as little as 5 minutes. Users only need their Hong Kong ID card and mobile phone number to complete the process, making it faster than brewing a cup of coffee.
promotions.quota: Hong Kong identity card holders aged 18 or above, non-US persons only

promotions.title: Start Saving from HKD 1
promotions.highlight: 💰 Start saving with as little as HKD 1
promotions.description: Fusion Bank allows customers to start saving with as little as HKD 1. This flexible saving plan lets customers save for their next adventure or personal milestone with minimal initial investment.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Transfers in HKD, CNY and USD
promotions.highlight: 💱 Instant local transfers in HKD, CNY and USD
promotions.description: Fusion Bank provides seamless local transfers in multiple currencies including HKD, CNY, and USD. Customers can make instant transfers to other local accounts in these currencies anytime and anywhere.

promotions.title: Global Remittance Service
promotions.highlight: 🌍 Send money globally from your smartphone
promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers global remittance services that allow customers to send money worldwide directly from their smartphones. Users can buy foreign currency at real-time exchange rates and send it out or use it for cashless spending through payment networks.

promotions.title: Deposit Protection up to HKD 800,000
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Deposits protected up to HKD 800,000
promotions.description: Fusion Bank is a member of Hong Kong's Deposit Protection Scheme, providing security for customer deposits. All eligible deposits are protected up to a maximum of HKD 800,000 per depositor.

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit Bonus Interest for Foreign Currency Exchange
promotions.highlight: 🔼 Extra interest for foreign currency time deposits
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy bonus interest rates when placing foreign currency into time deposits at Fusion Bank. This offer applies to currency exchange and time deposit combinations with no upper limit on deposit amounts.

promotions.title: Flash Monday High-Interest HKD Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Special high interest rates for HKD time deposits on Mondays
promotions.description: Fusion Bank offers 'Flash Monday' promotions featuring elevated interest rates for Hong Kong Dollar time deposits. This special high-yield time deposit opportunity is available on a limited-time basis, typically on Mondays.
promotions.period: Limited time offer, likely on Mondays

promotions.title: Savings Interest Plus
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enhanced interest rates for savings accounts
promotions.description: Fusion Bank's Savings Interest Plus promotion offers higher than standard interest rates for savings account holders. This special interest rate enhancement allows customers to earn more on their deposited funds.

promotions.title: Foreign Currency Time Deposit Interest Rate Boost
promotions.highlight: 🔼 Enhanced interest rates for foreign currency time deposits
promotions.description: Special promotion offering boosted interest rates for time deposits in foreign currencies. Available for customers exchanging currencies and placing them in time deposits.

promotions.title: liviSave Preferential Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn preferential savings interest rate with no minimum deposit
promotions.description: Customers who add funds to liviSave can enjoy a special preferential savings rate. No minimum deposit required to earn this enhanced interest rate.

promotions.title: Fast and Free FPS Transfers
promotions.highlight: 💸 Fast and free transfers via FPS anytime
promotions.description: Make instant and free transfers to anyone at any time using the Faster Payment System (FPS). Transfer money quickly without incurring any fees.

promotions.title: Secure QR Payment System
promotions.highlight: 📲 Secure QR payments accepted across Hong Kong
promotions.description: Make fast and secure payments using QR codes at merchants all across Hong Kong. Enjoy a seamless and safe shopping experience with livi's QR payment service.

promotions.title: 100% Online Account Opening
promotions.highlight: 📱 Open a bank account 100% online with no complicated documents
promotions.description: Open a livi bank account completely online via the app without complicated documentation. The process is quick and easy, allowing customers to start using their account immediately.

promotions.title: livi Rewards Program
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Enjoy everyday delights and rewards as a livi customer
promotions.description: livi bank offers a rewards program that brings everyday delights and rewards to customers. The program is highlighted as 'livi Rewards is here' and 'livi「賞宇宙」登場' on the website.

promotions.title: liviSave No Fees Account
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum deposit required
promotions.description: Open a liviSave account with no fees and no minimum deposit balance requirements. The account caters to both paying and saving needs with complete flexibility.

promotions.title: Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Comprehensive travel insurance protection
promotions.description: livi offers the Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan to provide protection during your travels. This plan covers various travel-related risks and emergencies for customers.

promotions.title: Easy HomeCare Insurance
promotions.highlight: 🏠 Protection for your home with Easy HomeCare
promotions.description: livi provides Easy HomeCare insurance plan to protect customers' homes and belongings. This insurance product offers coverage for various home-related risks and damages.

promotions.title: Pet Care Insurance
promotions.highlight: 🐾 Insurance coverage for your beloved pets
promotions.description: livi offers Pet Care insurance plan to help cover veterinary expenses and other pet-related costs. This plan provides financial protection for pet owners when caring for their furry family members.

promotions.title: livi Flexi Personal Loan
promotions.highlight: 💸 Flexible personal loan solutions
promotions.description: livi Flexi Loan offers personal loan options with flexible terms to meet various financial needs. The loan product provides customers with access to funds for personal expenses with customizable repayment schedules.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: livi Flexi Balance Transfer
promotions.highlight: 💱 Transfer outstanding balances with flexible terms
promotions.description: livi offers a Balance Transfer option under their Flexi Loan product to help customers consolidate existing debts. This service allows transferring balances from other financial institutions to livi with potentially more favorable terms.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: livi Business SME Financing
promotions.highlight: 🏢 Financing solutions for small and medium enterprises
promotions.description: livi Business offers SME Financing options to help small and medium-sized businesses access capital for growth and operations. This financing solution is designed specifically for the needs of SME customers.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: BOC Chill Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Special benefits with the BOC Chill Card
promotions.description: livi offers the BOC Chill Card for customers looking for payment solutions with added benefits. This card provides various privileges and features for cardholders' everyday spending needs.

promotions.title: BOC Mastercard Debit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Convenient spending with BOC Mastercard Debit Card
promotions.description: livi provides the BOC Mastercard Debit Card that allows direct access to funds in customers' accounts. This card offers worldwide acceptance and secure payment options for daily transactions.

promotions.title: Money Safe Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Special rewards for keeping your money safe
promotions.description: livi offers 'Money Safe Rewards' (智安存獎賞) program that provides benefits to customers for maintaining security measures. This program rewards customers for practicing safe banking habits.

promotions.title: No Minimum Deposit Requirement
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum balance requirements
promotions.description: Open and maintain a liviSave account with no minimum deposit requirement and no maintenance fees. This feature makes the account accessible to everyone regardless of their financial situation.

promotions.title: QR Cash Withdrawal
promotions.highlight: 💳 Withdraw cash using QR codes
promotions.description: livi offers a QR Cash feature that allows users to withdraw money using QR codes. This provides a convenient alternative to traditional ATM card withdrawals.

promotions.title: Pay your tax with Mox Credit Card, split and earn cash reward
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD500 cash reward when paying tax with installments
promotions.description: Pay your tax bill with Mox Credit Card and apply for Instalment during the promotion period. Split your payment to ease financial pressure while earning up to HKD500 in cash rewards.

promotions.title: Tax Season Instant Loan with Low APR
promotions.highlight: 💸 APR as low as 1.18% plus cash rewards up to HKD10,888
promotions.description: Tax Season Instant Loan with APR reduced to as low as 1.18%. Apply through the Mox app for personalized quotation and instant disbursement. Earn up to HKD10,888 cash reward for successful application of designated Instant Loans.

promotions.title: Keeta Exclusive Flash Sale
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Enjoy up to HKD80 off orders on Keeta with Mox Card
promotions.description: Order on Keeta with your Mox Card during the promotion period and enjoy a Mox exclusive discount of up to HKD20 off per order, saving up to HKD80 for the whole month. Additional surprise vouchers and welcome rewards available.
promotions.cost: Keeta order payment with Mox Card

promotions.title: Mox x Xiaomi Flagship Camera Phone Offer
promotions.highlight: 📱 Up to 7% total cash rewards at Xiaomi + 0% Instalments
promotions.description: Shop at mi.com or any Xiaomi Store with Mox Credit Card to unlock up to 5% extra cash rebate (capped at HKD450) plus up to 12-month 0% interest instalments. Combined with standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack for a total of up to 7% cash rewards.
promotions.quota: New customers only for the HKD2,150 signup bonus

promotions.title: Mox Journey from Scratch Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💥 Win up to HKD8,888 with Mox Scratch Cards
promotions.description: Complete any of five simple challenges to get a Mox Scratch Card with instant prize reveals. Finish more challenges to multiply your chances of winning the top prize of HKD8,888 (HKD8,000 SOL + HKD888 cash reward).

promotions.title: Indulge and Grow Bonus Deposit Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💰 Chance to win a 1-month 'free lunch' with your deposits
promotions.description: Deposit your bonus into Mox to earn great interest and get a chance to win a 1-month 'free lunch'. For every HKD10,000 deposited, get one entry into the lucky draw. Higher deposits increase chances of winning.

promotions.title: Mox x csl Best-in-Town Exclusive Plan Offer
promotions.highlight: 📱 Get up to HKD1,380 rebates + free NowTV Pass with csl plans
promotions.description: Sign up for a new plan or renew an existing one with csl using Mox Credit Card autopay to enjoy an HKD180 monthly fee rebate plus a free Now TV beIN SPORTS Super Pack 1-Month Pass (valued at HKD188).
promotions.quota: For new plan sign-ups or renewals
promotions.cost: csl plan subscription with Mox Credit Card autopay

promotions.title: Travel Pick & Go Eggstra Care+ Insurance Promotion
promotions.highlight: ✈️ 1 FREE add-on coverage with Travel Pick & Go insurance
promotions.description: Apply for Travel Pick & Go insurance during the promotion period to receive 1 FREE add-on coverage. Helps safeguard your trip from financial stress caused by unexpected events.
promotions.cost: Purchase of Travel Pick & Go insurance

promotions.title: MOXTRAVEL New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving
promotions.description: New customers who enter invitation code 'MOXTRAVEL' when opening a Mox account and applying for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving - enough for a round-trip flight to Asia.
promotions.cost: Opening Mox account and applying for Mox Credit Card

promotions.title: Samsung S26 Series Exclusive Offer at The Club
promotions.highlight: 📱 HKD100 off the new Samsung S26 series at The Club
promotions.description: Get an exclusive HKD100 discount on the new Samsung S26 series when shopping at The Club with your Mox Credit Card. Spend HKD1,800 or more and enter promo code CLUBMOX2026 to enjoy the instant discount, plus earn up to 2% Unlimited CashBack.
promotions.cost: Minimum spend of HKD1,800 at The Club

promotions.title: Uber Taxi Ride Spending Reward
promotions.highlight: 🚕 Up to HKD90 off Uber Taxi rides
promotions.description: Enjoy HKD10 off each Uber Taxi ride per month when paying with your Mox Card during the promotion period. Applies whether you're visiting family, heading out for the weekend, or catching a flight.

promotions.title: MOXDEPO Time Deposit Invitation Code Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD2,500 cash rewards with Time Deposit
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using invitation code 'MOXDEPO', complete account opening within 15 days, place a Time Deposit of at least HKD250,000 within 7 days, and maintain the balance until the end of the Hold Fund Period to earn HKD2,500 cash rewards.
promotions.quota: Only for customers who haven't held any Mox Account in the 12 months prior

promotions.title: MOXSMART Double Rewards Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💸 Earn 20% cash rebate from spendings across 5 hot merchants
promotions.description: Earn a 20% cash rebate when spending across 5 popular merchants, plus additional rewards from savings. Double reward promotion combining spending and saving benefits.

promotions.title: MOXBILL26 HKT Bill Payment Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD1,200 cash rewards + up to 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: Pay your HKT bills using Mox and earn HKD1,200 in cash rewards plus up to 2% Unlimited CashBack. Simple way to earn rewards on your regular bill payments.

promotions.title: Trip.com Year-round Exclusive Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to 8% off + up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on Trip.com
promotions.description: Enjoy up to 8% discount on Trip.com bookings all year long when using Mox Credit Card. Also earn up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on your purchases, making travel bookings more rewarding.
promotions.cost: Trip.com booking with Mox Credit Card

promotions.title: Personal Accident Cushion Premium Rebate
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Enjoy up to 2 months of premium rebate
promotions.description: Get up to 2 months of premium rebate when purchasing Personal Accident Cushion insurance. Double the typical reward for a limited time, providing extra value on your protection plan.
promotions.cost: Purchase of Personal Accident Cushion insurance

promotions.title: Payroll with Mox Top-up Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💸 Top up 1.5% p.a. on savings & Unlimited 2% CashBack
promotions.description: Set up your payroll with Mox to receive a top-up of 1.5% p.a. on your savings account balance. Also enjoy Unlimited 2% CashBack on purchases with your Mox Credit Card, maximizing both savings and spending rewards.
promotions.cost: Setting up payroll deposit to Mox

promotions.title: Mission Bonus Rate
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Stack up to 3.5% p.a. on your deposits
promotions.description: Complete various missions to stack up and earn an interest rate of up to 3.5% p.a. on your deposits. The more missions completed, the higher the interest rate earned on your savings.

promotions.title: Mox Referral Programme
promotions.highlight: 🎉 Both referrer and referee earn HKD300 cash reward each
promotions.description: Share your referral code to invite friends to join Mox. When your friend opens a Mox account, applies for a Mox Credit Card and completes HKD1,000 eligible spending within the specified timeframe, both you and your friend will earn HKD300 cash reward each.
promotions.quota: No limit to number of referrals
promotions.cost: Referee must spend HKD1,000 with Mox Credit Card

promotions.title: CLUBLINK New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Enjoy rewards worth up to HKD1,400
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account with invitation code 'CLUBLINK' to enjoy fantastic rewards worth up to HKD1,400. Special promotion for new customers linking Mox with The Club membership benefits.
promotions.cost: Opening Mox account with specified code

promotions.title: Mox Zone on The Club
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ Enjoy year-round deals on The Club
promotions.description: Access exclusive year-round deals through Mox Zone on The Club platform. Special discounts and offers available continuously for Mox customers shopping on The Club.

promotions.title: Mox Asia Miles Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn Asia Miles with Time Deposits
promotions.description: Place time deposits with Mox to earn Asia Miles rewards. Travel further by converting your savings into miles that can be redeemed for flights and travel perks with Cathay Pacific and partner airlines.

promotions.title: FlexiBoost Savings
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy flexibility with competitive interest rates
promotions.description: FlexiBoost offers unmatched flexibility with competitive interest rates on your savings. Benefit from high-yield savings account features while maintaining access to your funds when needed.

promotions.title: New FX Users Reward
promotions.highlight: 💱 Get up to HKD175 cash rewards for new FX users
promotions.description: New users of Mox FX services can earn up to HKD175 in cash rewards. Special welcome bonus for first-time foreign exchange transactions through the Mox platform.

promotions.title: Unlimited CashBack with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Enjoy unlimited cashback on all spending
promotions.description: Mox Credit Card offers Unlimited CashBack on all your spending with no caps or category restrictions. Simply use your card for any purchase to earn cashback automatically, making every transaction more rewarding.

promotions.title: Instant Interest on Time Deposits
promotions.highlight: 🔄 0% interest on Instant Clear facility
promotions.description: Access funds with 0% interest through Mox's Instant Clear facility. Quickly borrow what you need without paying interest, making it an affordable way to manage short-term cash flow needs.

promotions.title: 1500MOX New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD1,500 cash reward plus access to 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: New customers who use invitation code '1500MOX' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to HKD1,500 in cash rewards by meeting spending requirements at any merchant in Hong Kong. Limited time offer to unlock 2% Unlimited CashBack.

promotions.title: Instant Earnings on Deposits
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Say goodbye to waiting for interest payments
promotions.description: Enjoy instant earnings on your deposits with Mox. Unlike traditional banks with monthly or quarterly interest payments, Mox calculates and credits interest immediately, so you start earning from the moment you deposit.

promotions.title: Mox Credit Miles Conversion Rate
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn 1 mile for every HKD4 spent with no limits
promotions.description: Convert your spending to miles at a rate of HKD4=1 mile with no limits when using your Mox Credit Card. Additional benefits include 0% foreign exchange fees, making it ideal for travelers.

promotions.title: 0% Foreign Currency Transaction Fees
promotions.highlight: 🌍 0% foreign currency transaction fees on all overseas spending
promotions.description: Enjoy 0% foreign currency transaction fees on all overseas spending with Mox Credit Card. This includes both foreign currency conversion fees and cross-border HKD transaction fees, making international purchases more affordable.
promotions.quota: Must select Asia Miles as reward program

promotions.title: Mox Credit Card Miles Rewards Scheme
promotions.highlight: ✈️ For all spending HKD4=1 mile + 0 Limits + 0% FX Fees
promotions.description: Earn 1 mile for every HKD4 spent with your Mox Credit Card with no earning limits. Additionally, enjoy 0% foreign exchange fees on international purchases, making this ideal for travelers.
promotions.cost: Spending with Mox Credit Card required

promotions.title: MOXHKT25 HKT Shopping Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💰 Shop at HKT to get HKD1,400 Cash Rewards
promotions.description: Shop at HKT with your Mox Card to earn HKD1,400 in Cash Rewards. This limited-time promotion offers substantial rewards for shopping at HKT stores.

promotions.title: MOXDEPO Time Deposit Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD2,500 cash rewards with Time Deposit
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using invitation code 'MOXDEPO', complete account opening within 15 days, place a Time Deposit of at least HKD250,000 within 7 days, and maintain the balance until the end of the Hold Fund Period to earn HKD2,500 cash rewards.
promotions.quota: New customers who haven't held any Mox Account in 12 months
promotions.cost: Minimum Time Deposit of HKD250,000 required

promotions.title: 0% Interest Instant Clear
promotions.highlight: 💳 0% interest* on Instant Clear for credit card balance transfers
promotions.description: Clear your external credit card bills from other banks or financial institutions with Instant Clear and save as much as 94% interest charges. The process takes only a few minutes and offers 0% interest options.

promotions.title: Year-round offers with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Exclusive offers with Unlimited CashBack or Miles
promotions.description: Enjoy fabulous year-round offers when using your Mox Credit Card at partner merchants. Earn Unlimited CashBack or Unlimited Miles on all your spending throughout the year.
promotions.quota: Available to all Mox Credit Card holders

promotions.title: Daily Interest Calculation
promotions.highlight: 💸 Interest on savings calculated and credited to your account daily
promotions.description: Mox calculates and credits interest to your Mox Account daily, allowing your savings to grow faster. This is a permanent feature of Mox accounts with no end date or special eligibility requirements.

promotions.title: Mox Invest Trading Services
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade HK and US stocks including fractional shares with low fees
promotions.description: Mox is the first digital bank allowing customers to trade in both HK and US stocks, including fractional shares. Invest with low fees in stocks and funds with the security and advantages of a bank.

promotions.title: USD Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💵 1% p.a. interest on USD savings with no strings attached
promotions.description: Starting 1 March 2025, enjoy 1% p.a. interest on your USD savings with no strings attached. Interest is calculated and credited to your account daily, allowing you to watch your savings grow every day.

promotions.title: Mox Credit FPS Payments
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Pay with Mox Credit via FPS for transfers and bill payments
promotions.description: Use your Mox Credit to make payments via FPS, making daily transfers or paying bills effortlessly. This feature is automatically unlocked when your credit limit is approved, with no extra documents required.

promotions.title: 3-Minute Investment Account Opening for Existing Customers
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as little as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Customers can open a bank account in as fast as 3 minutes with no minimum balance requirement. This streamlined account opening process is available for standard cases where no additional information or documents are required.

promotions.title: 24/7 Full Banking Capability
promotions.highlight: 🕗 Access banking services anytime, day or night
promotions.description: Customers can access full banking capabilities through the mobile app 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. This allows for managing deposits, transfers, cross-border payments and FX without time restrictions.

promotions.title: Services for Residents and Visitors in Hong Kong
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Banking services available to visitors in Hong Kong
promotions.description: Banking services are available to visiting customers who are physically present in Hong Kong. This allows non-residents to access Ping An Digital Bank's services while in Hong Kong.

promotions.title: Low Investment Threshold for Money Market Funds
promotions.highlight: 💰 0 subscription and redemption fees for money market funds
promotions.description: Customers can subscribe to and redeem money market funds with zero transaction fees. Fund redemption can be completed as quickly as same day with funds credited to the customer's bank account.
promotions.cost: Investment amount as low as USD 20

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stocks Trading with 0 Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade Hong Kong stocks with no platform fees
promotions.description: Customers can trade Hong Kong stocks with 0 platform fees and a commission rate of 0.15% (minimum HKD 50 per transaction). Service includes real-time LV1 market index data to help determine trading timing.

promotions.title: US Stocks Extended Trading Hours
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Trade US stocks up to 16 hours per day with pre-market and after-hours trading
promotions.description: Customers can trade US stocks during extended hours including pre-market, regular market, and after-market sessions. Total trading time extends up to 16 hours per day, offering greater flexibility for investors.
promotions.cost: USD 0.012 per share commission, minimum USD 7.88 per transaction

promotions.title: Free LV1 Real-time Hong Kong Stock Quotes
promotions.highlight: 🔍 Unlimited free real-time LV1 stock quotes
promotions.description: Customers who activate stock investment services can access free real-time LV1 market data for Hong Kong stocks. This includes unlimited real-time quotes to help make timely investment decisions.

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💰 Bank with zero minimum balance requirements
promotions.description: PAObank offers accounts with no minimum balance requirement. Customers can maintain their accounts without worrying about meeting minimum balance thresholds or incurring related fees.

promotions.title: Mixed and Equity Funds 1% Subscription Fee
promotions.highlight: 🏦 Low subscription fees for various fund types
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy discounted subscription fees for various fund types: 0.5% for bond funds and 1% for mixed and equity funds. This makes fund investments more accessible with lower entry costs.
promotions.cost: 0.5% for bond funds, 1% for mixed and equity funds

promotions.title: Same-Day Money Market Fund Redemption
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Get your money back as soon as same day when redeeming money market funds
promotions.description: Fast redemption service for money market funds with funds credited to the customer's bank account as quickly as the same day. Provides high liquidity for money market investments.

promotions.title: US Stock Trading Fixed Commission
promotions.highlight: 🇺🇸 Trade US stocks for just USD 0.012 per share
promotions.description: PAObank offers US stock trading with a competitive commission of USD 0.012 per share with a minimum charge of USD 7.88 per trade. There are no additional platform fees, providing transparent pricing for US stock investors.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders
promotions.cost: USD 0.012 per share (minimum USD 7.88 per trade)

promotions.title: System Upgrade Notice
promotions.highlight: ⚠️ Scheduled maintenance affecting mobile banking and customer services
promotions.description: The bank will perform system upgrades and maintenance from 01:30am to 06:30am on August 9, 2020. During this period, mobile banking and customer services may be impacted.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet Best FX Rates in Town
promotions.highlight: 💱 Best FX exchange rates in Hong Kong
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers the best FX rates in town for 10 major currencies. The comparison is based on rates from 28 retail banks in Hong Kong, with rates updated daily.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card Zero Foreign Transaction Fee
promotions.highlight: 🌎 $0 foreign currency transaction fee for 10 major currencies
promotions.description: Enjoy $0 foreign currency transaction fee when using WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card for transactions in 10 supported currencies including JPY, USD, CNY, AUD, GBP, EUR, SGD, CAD, CHF, and NZD.

promotions.title: Easter Lucky Draw & Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Win one of 300 prizes including HKD1,000 travel vouchers
promotions.description: Earn lucky draw chances when spending with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card and exchanging foreign currencies. 300 prizes available during the promotion period.
promotions.cost: At least one eligible transaction required during the prize calculation period

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet Overseas Spending Cashback
promotions.highlight: 💰 Up to 3% cash rebate on overseas spending
promotions.description: Enjoy up to 0.2% cash rebate on local spending and up to 3% cash rebate on overseas spending with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card during the promotion period.
promotions.quota: Maximum rebate of HKD 50 or equivalent per eligible transaction
promotions.cost: Any spending with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card

promotions.title: WeLab Bank New Customer 2-in-1 Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Up to HKD 5,000 in welcome rewards
promotions.description: New customers can enjoy up to 4% p.a. on time deposits plus up to HKD 4,000 fund transaction cash reward when using promo code 'WL5000' during account opening.
promotions.cost: Time deposit: HKD 80,000 and HKD 200,000. Fund transaction: Up to HKD 1,000,000

promotions.title: HKD 50 First Foreign Currency Exchange Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💱 HKD 50 rebate on first foreign currency exchange
promotions.description: First-time foreign currency exchange customers can enjoy HKD 50 cash rebate when exchanging HKD 20,000 or above to 10 designated popular currencies in a single transaction.
promotions.quota: First-time foreign currency exchange customers only, limited quota on first-come-first-served basis
promotions.cost: Single transaction of HKD 20,000 or above

promotions.title: Featured Funds $0 Subscription and Switching Fee
promotions.highlight: 💰 $0 subscription and switching fees on all funds
promotions.description: Enjoy unlimited $0 subscription and switching fees when investing in funds through WeLab Bank. Choose from over 170 funds from 11 leading global fund companies.
promotions.cost: Platform fee of 0.1% per month on fund holdings

promotions.title: Trip.com Discount with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to HKD 500 discount on Trip.com bookings
promotions.description: Book flights and hotels on Trip.com with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card and enter the designated promo code to enjoy a discount of up to HKD 500.
promotions.cost: Booking of designated products with minimum spending required

promotions.title: Tesla Customer Personal Instalment Loan Offer
promotions.highlight: 🚘 Preferential rate from 4.55% APR for Tesla customers
promotions.description: Tesla customers can enjoy a preferential rate from 4.55% APR on personal instalment loans by using promo code 'TESLA5' and providing Tesla vehicle subscription proof.
promotions.quota: Tesla customers only, limited quota on first-come-first-served basis

promotions.title: 50 Extra Lucky Draw Chances for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🎰 50 extra lucky draw chances for new customers
promotions.description: New customers receive 50 extra chances to participate in the lucky draw and win from 300 prizes. Also enjoy 3% cash rebate on overseas spending with Global Wallet Debit Card.

promotions.title: Personal Loan Cash Rebate up to HKD 23,888
promotions.highlight: 💸 Up to HKD 23,888 cash rebate on personal loans
promotions.description: WeLab Bank customers who successfully apply for personal loans with approved amounts of HKD 150,001 or above and repayment periods of 24 months or above can enjoy cash rebates of up to HKD 23,888.
promotions.cost: Minimum loan amount of HKD 150,001 and minimum repayment period of 24 months

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Referral Rewards for Personal Loan
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD 800 for each successful loan referral
promotions.description: Refer friends or family to apply for WeLab Bank personal loans and receive HKD 800 cash reward per successful referral. Maximum reward of HKD 8,000 (10 referrals) during the promotion period.
promotions.quota: Maximum 10 successful referrals per customer during promotion period

promotions.title: Digital Wealth Advisory Service
promotions.highlight: 🤖 AI-powered personalized investment portfolio recommendations
promotions.description: In partnership with Allianz Global Investors, WeLab Bank's Digital Wealth Advisory service provides personalized fund portfolio recommendations based on investment objectives and personal circumstances with automated alerts to track investment progress.

promotions.title: Investment Fund Cash Reward
promotions.highlight: 💹 Earn up to HKD 4,000 cash reward on fund investments
promotions.description: New customers who open an account with promo code 'WL5000' can enjoy up to HKD 4,000 cash reward on eligible fund transactions. The reward amount is based on the cumulative eligible fund transaction amount.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank 4% p.a. GoSave 2.0 Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: 💵 Enjoy 4% p.a. interest rate on HKD time deposits
promotions.description: New customers who open an account with promo code 'WL5000' can place HKD GoSave 2.0 time deposits at 4% annual interest rate. This is part of the 2-in-1 Welcome Offer for new customers.

promotions.title: WeLab Money Plus Investment Service
promotions.highlight: 📊 Low-risk money market fund with same-day settlement
promotions.description: WeLab Money Plus offers money market funds with same-day settlement when instructions are submitted before 9am HKT. Aims for returns similar to time deposits but without lock-in periods.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Personal Loan R Friends Referral Program
promotions.highlight: 👥 Earn HKD800 for each successful personal loan referral
promotions.description: WeLab Bank customers can refer friends or relatives to apply for a WeLab Bank personal loan using their referral code. For each successful referral who draws down the loan within 7 days of approval, the referrer receives HKD800 cash reward.
promotions.quota: Maximum 10 successful referrals (HKD8,000) per customer during promotion period

promotions.title: 0.1% Monthly Fund Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 💼 Low 0.1% monthly fee instead of traditional subscription fees
promotions.description: WeLab Bank charges a uniform monthly fee of 0.1% based on the total value of selected funds, helping customers save nearly 85% in transaction fees compared to traditional subscription fee models. This allows for unlimited trading and portfolio adjustments.
promotions.cost: 0.1% monthly platform fee based on fund value

promotions.title: ZA Bank 0% Fund Subscription Fee Offer
promotions.highlight: 📈 0% subscription fees on ALL funds with no cap
promotions.description: ZA Bank customers who have activated fund trading services can enjoy 0% subscription fees on all funds until July 31, 2026. The offer has no cap, allowing 100% of investment to go directly into the market.
promotions.quota: All retail banking users who have activated fund trading services

promotions.title: StockBack x ZA Card Limited Time Offer
promotions.highlight: 🔥 Enhanced 1.5% stock rebate on card spending
promotions.description: During the promotion period, users can enjoy an enhanced stock rebate of 1.5% (instead of the standard 1%) on each eligible transaction when selecting a stock from the StockBack machine.
promotions.quota: Available to all ZA Card users during promotion period
promotions.cost: Minimum spend of HKD 10 per transaction

promotions.title: Year-Round Travel Offers with ZA Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Special discounts for travelers throughout the year
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides year-round travel offers for customers using ZA Card. These promotions include special discounts and benefits for travelers when making travel-related purchases.
promotions.period: Ongoing travel promotions with varying durations

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Hold 11 currencies in one account
promotions.description: ZA Bank's multi-currency savings account allows users to hold 11 different currencies, including HKD, CNY, USD, GBP, SGD, EUR, CAD, AUD, JPY, NZD, and CHF. Users can exchange currencies 24/7 at preferred rates.

promotions.title: Free Cash Withdrawals at Visa ATMs
promotions.highlight: 💵 Free cash withdrawals at over 3,000 Visa ATMs
promotions.description: ZA Card holders can withdraw cash for free at more than 3,000 Visa ATMs throughout Hong Kong. This service provides convenient access to cash without incurring withdrawal fees.

promotions.title: Free Crypto Trading Platform Fee for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🪙 $0 platform fee for crypto trading for first 90 days
promotions.description: New customers can enjoy zero platform fees for cryptocurrency trading during the first 90 days after account opening. The service allows 24/7 trading directly with HKD or USD deposits.

promotions.title: Custom Card Number Selection
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Choose the last 6 digits on your ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Bank is the first in Hong Kong to allow customers to choose the last 6 digits on their card face. This personalization feature lets users create a unique and memorable card number of their choice.
promotions.quota: Available to all ZA Card holders

promotions.title: ZA Bank FPS Free Instant Transfers
promotions.highlight: 💸 Free instant transfers via FPS
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers free instant cross-bank transfers via FPS. Users can send and receive HKD and CNY using just a mobile phone number, with no fees charged for the service.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 24/7 Banking Service
promotions.highlight: 🕒 24x7 customer service available anytime
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides round-the-clock customer service support to all users. Banking services are always available regardless of time of day, allowing customers to access support whenever needed.

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stock Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🏦 0% commission and no custody fees on HK stocks
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers 0% commission and zero custody fees for Hong Kong stock trading. Platform fees are as low as HKD 18 per transaction, providing cost-effective stock trading services for all users.
promotions.cost: Platform fee as low as HKD 18 per transaction

promotions.title: ZA Card Millionaire PowerDraw
promotions.highlight: 💸 Chance to share HKD 1 million prize pool
promotions.description: ZA Card users can collect MillionTix through PowerDraw when making eligible transactions. These tickets give users a chance to share in a prize pool of HKD 1 million.
promotions.quota: Available to all ZA Card users during promotion period

promotions.title: Loan Approval in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Loan approval results in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers fast loan approval with results available in as little as 90 seconds. Loan amounts up to HKD 1,000,000 are available with annualized percentage rates as low as 1.30%.

promotions.title: Quick Insurance in 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Get insured in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: ZA Bank's partnership with ZA Insure allows customers to get insured in as little as 3 minutes via their smartphone. Options include life insurance, critical illness insurance, and Voluntary Health Insurance Scheme (VHIS).

promotions.title: HKD 1,000 Stock Purchase Cash Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💸 Up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate on stock purchases
promotions.description: Selected customers can receive up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate when purchasing stocks through ZA Bank. Cash rebate vouchers can be claimed through ZA Quest and applied to eligible stock transactions.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Account Opening in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined account opening process that allows customers to open an account in as little as 2 minutes. The service is available to both Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong with zero deposit requirements.

promotions.title: Zero Fee SWIFT Transfers
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Zero ZA Bank fee for SWIFT transfers to 140+ countries
promotions.description: ZA Bank does not charge any fees for SWIFT transfers to over 140 countries and regions worldwide. This service allows customers to send money internationally without paying bank fees from ZA Bank side.

promotions.title: New Account Opening Cash Reward
promotions.highlight: 💰 Up to HKD 500 cash reward for new accounts
promotions.description: Selected customers can receive up to HKD 500 cash reward when opening a new ZA Bank account. The reward is available after completing specific tasks in ZA Quest after account opening.
promotions.quota: Selected customers only, not applicable to MGM referrals

promotions.title: Refer a Friend Account Opening Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🤝 Earn up to HKD 90,000 by referring friends
promotions.description: Existing customers can earn rewards by referring friends to open ZA Bank accounts. Top 20 referrers in each of 9 phases can earn up to HKD 10,000 per phase. Additional rewards available when referred friends meet deposit conditions.
promotions.quota: No cap on referrals, top 20 ranking required for maximum rewards

promotions.title: 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit for Referred New Customers
promotions.highlight: 💹 20% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit for depositing funds
promotions.description: New customers referred through MGM can receive +19.9% p.a. interest rate booster voucher for 7-day HKD time deposits (up to HKD 20,000) after depositing ≥ HKD 1,000 from external accounts within 14 days of opening.
promotions.quota: New referred customers who meet deposit conditions
promotions.cost: Must deposit ≥ HKD 1,000 within 14 days of account opening

promotions.title: Fund Redemption Fee Waiver
promotions.highlight: 🆓 Redemption fee waivers for all funds
promotions.description: ZA Bank customers who have activated fund trading services can enjoy redemption fee waivers for all funds until July 31, 2026. This allows investors to redeem their fund investments without paying any redemption fees.
promotions.quota: All retail banking users who have activated fund trading services

promotions.title: Customer Referral Program - Referrer Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Earn up to HKD 90,000 in cash rewards for referrals
promotions.description: Refer friends to open ZA Bank accounts and earn various cash rewards. Top 20 referrers with most successful referrals in each phase can earn up to HKD 10,000. Additional rewards available when referred friends meet deposit or multi-product requirements.
promotions.quota: All existing ZA Bank customers eligible to refer

promotions.title: New Customer Welcome Reward and StockBack Bonus
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Rewards worth HKD 2,026 for new customers via referral
promotions.description: New customers who open an account using a referral code can receive a package of rewards worth HKD 2,026 including fund holding rebate coupons (HKD 780 + HKD 20), stock cash rebate coupons, currency exchange discount, and overseas remittance cashback.
promotions.quota: New customers who open account with referral code

promotions.title: ZA Bank Payment Connect Cross-Border Transfer
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Fee-free real-time transfers between Mainland China and Hong Kong
promotions.description: Send money between Mainland China and Hong Kong in real-time with zero fees using Payment Connect. Instant cross-border transfers without any handling charges.

promotions.title: New Stock Trading Customer Cash Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 1,500 in cash rewards for new stock traders
promotions.description: New users can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards for opening an account, plus up to HKD 1,000 in cash rebates for buying stocks. This offer is specifically for Hong Kong stock trading customers.
promotions.cost: Must buy stocks to qualify for portion of rewards

promotions.title: Second 20% p.a. Time Deposit for Multi-Product Usage
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Additional 20% p.a. time deposit for using multiple products
promotions.description: New referred customers who hold deposits, funds, and stocks with a total balance of at least HKD 1,000 within 14 days of opening an account can receive an additional +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate booster coupon, providing a second opportunity to enjoy 20% p.a. interest.
promotions.quota: New referred customers using multiple products

promotions.title: 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit for Meeting Deposit Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💹 New users can enjoy 20% p.a. interest rate on 7-day HKD time deposits
promotions.description: New customers referred through the referral program can receive a +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate bonus coupon, which combined with the base rate offers a total of 20% p.a. interest rate. Additional coupons can be earned by meeting specified requirements.
promotions.cost: Must be referred through program and meet deposit requirements

promotions.title: Fund Position Rebate Vouchers for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🧾 Receive HKD 800 in fund position rebate vouchers
promotions.description: New customers can receive fund position rebate vouchers worth HKD 800 (including one HKD 780 voucher and one HKD 20 voucher). These vouchers are valid for 30 days after receipt and can be used to offset fund investment costs.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Currency Exchange Discount Voucher
promotions.highlight: 💱 Receive HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher
promotions.description: New customers can receive a HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher valid for 30 days after receipt. This voucher can be used to reduce the cost of currency exchange transactions within ZA Bank.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: ZA Card No Annual Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 No annual fees or hidden charges on ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Bank's Visa debit card comes with no annual fees or hidden charges, providing a cost-effective payment solution. The card supports Apple Pay and Google Pay for convenient digital payments.

promotions.title: Group Lai See Feature
promotions.highlight: 🧧 Send Group Lai See with one tap without entering recipients individually
promotions.description: Users can distribute Lai See (red packets) to groups with a single tap, eliminating the need to enter recipients individually. This convenient feature simplifies the traditional practice of sending red packets during holidays and special occasions.

promotions.title: ZA Bank x Wise Express Remittance
promotions.highlight: 🚀 HKD payments with express remittance by Wise arrive faster than standard transfers
promotions.description: ZA Bank partners with Wise to provide express remittance services, allowing HKD payments to arrive faster than standard international transfers. This service enables quicker cross-border payments for users.
